title: Senior Frontend Developer at Nature's Basket Holdings Services

jsonLd.title: Senior Frontend Developer at Nature's Basket Holdings Services
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Nature's Basket Holdings Services. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Frontend Developer to strengthen our Navi Mumbai-based team.

About Nature's Basket Holdings Services:
Nature's Basket Holdings Services is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Microservices

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Professional development and training programs
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nature's Basket Holdings Services!
